risks.title: Unsafe autonomous code changes
risks.mitigation: Human approval gates for high-severity rule impacts and generated patches.

risks.title: Cross-tenant context leakage
risks.mitigation: Enforce tenant and project scope before retrieval, prompt build, and graph query.

risks.title: Incomplete backup/restore of graph and memory
risks.mitigation: Documented restore drills covering Postgres, Neo4j projection, and audit evidence.

open_decisions.title: Default local vs remote model routing profiles
open_decisions.proposed_resolution: Published local + cloud ModelRoutingProfile JSON under backend/configs/model-routing; select via AGENTCORE_LITELLM_ROUTING_ENV.

open_decisions.title: Retention defaults for memory and audit evidence
open_decisions.proposed_resolution: Publish retention profile with legal hold and restore validation steps.
